top_findings.summary: The skill description specifies "permissionMode: bypassPermissions", which allows it to bypass all permission checks and potentially access any system resource or data without user consent. This is excessive for a skill discovery tool that only needs to scan Notion workspaces and local repositories for automation opportunities. Such broad permissions could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive or unrelated data, and is not justified by its stated purpose of identifying and validating skill potentials with human oversight.
